title: FLEX Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Decrease Y/Y
text: FLEX's first-quarter fiscal 2024 performance is affected by weakness across the Agility Solutions segment.

title: Flex (FLEX) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Flex (FLEX) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.57 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.51 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.54 per share a year ago.

title: Flex Ltd. (FLEX) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Flex Ltd. (NASDAQ:FLEX ) Q1 2024 Results Conference Call July 26, 2023 4:30 PM ET Company Participants David Rubin - VP, IR Revathi Advaithi - CEO Paul Lundstrom - CFO Conference Call Participants Mark Delaney - Goldman Sachs Ruplu Bhattacharya - Bank of America Samik Chatterjee - JP Morgan Matt Sheerin - Stifel Steven Fox - Fox Advisors Shannon Cross - Credit Suisse Operator Good afternoon and thank you for standing by. Welcome to Flex's First Quarter Fiscal 2024 Earnings Conference Call.

title: FLEX REPORTS FIRST QUARTER FISCAL 2024 RESULTS
text: AUSTIN, Texas , July 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) today announced results for its first quarter ended June 30, 2023. First Quarter Fiscal Year 2024 Highlights: Net Sales: $7.3 billion GAAP Operating Income: $291 million Adjusted Operating Income: $377 million GAAP Net Income attributable to Flex Ltd: $186 million Adjusted Net Income attributable to Flex Ltd: $258 million GAAP Earnings Per Share: $0.41 Adjusted Earnings Per Share: $0.57 An explanation and reconciliation of non-GAAP financial measures to GAAP financial measures is presented in Schedules II and V attached to this press release.

title: Flex (FLEX) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: Should You Buy?
text: Flex (FLEX) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Flex: Time To Join The Fourth Industrial Revolution
text: Flex, formerly known as Flextronics International, is embracing AI and machine learning to optimize manufacturing processes, reduce material loss, and improve customer satisfaction. The company is leveraging Industry 4.0 technologies in areas such as automation, connectivity, and continuous improvement in processes. Flex's financial results for FY23 were strong, with non-GAAP EPS of $0.57 beating consensus estimates by $0.06 and revenue of $7.3B increasing 9.2% YOY.

title: Flex named 2023 Manufacturer of the Year
text: Manufacturing Leadership Council and National Association of Manufacturers  award Flex for innovation and leadership across manufacturing technology, supply chain, and sustainability initiatives AUSTIN, Texas , July 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Recognized for its best-in-class achievement and transformational leadership to drive a new era of advanced, sustainable manufacturing, Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) was named the 2023 Manufacturer of the Year for a large enterprise.  The Manufacturing Leadership Council and National Association of Manufacturers presented Flex with the award at the recent Manufacturing Leadership Awards gala.

title: Flex: Strong Trends Ahead Of Quarterly Results, Margins In Focus
text: I reiterate a buy on Flex Ltd. ahead of its Q1 2024 earnings release due to its robust valuation and technical trends. The Singapore-based company, valued at $12.4 billion, is expected to report Q1 2024 revenue in the $7 to $7.5 billion range and adjusted EPS between $0.47 and $0.53. Despite no dividends expected, the stock still looks valuable with low-teen non-GAAP P/E multiples and a PEG ratio well below 1, with a fair value near $40.

title: Flex Ltd.: Nextracker IPO And Enphase Microinverter Partnership Are Positive Catalysts
text: Enphase Energy has invested $60 million to manufacture its microinverters in the US, with the finished product to be built by Flex Ltd. Flex, a global leader in contract supply-chain electronic manufacturing services, saw a 16.5% year-on-year revenue growth in FY23 and a 20.4% increase in non-GAAP income EPS. Flex recently completed the IPO of its solar-technology based Nextracker segment and reduced its debt by over $300 million in FY23.

title: Flex Announces Date for First Quarter Fiscal 2024 Earnings Call
text: AUSTIN, Texas , July 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) will announce its first quarter fiscal 2024 financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, July 26, 2023. The company will hold a conference call to discuss the results on the same day at 1:30 p.m.

title: FLEX Stock Gains 27.2% YTD: Will the Momentum Continue?
text: Flex FLEX witnessed strong momentum this year, with its shares rallying 27.2% compared with the sub-industry's rise of 14%.
